name: Creamy Cauliflower Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 medium head cauliflower, cut into florets (about 6 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 can broth to boiling in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Stir in cauliflower, celery, onion, and lemon juice.
3. Bring mixture back to a boil; reduce heat to medium.
4. Cover and cook for 15 minutes or until the cauliflower is tender. Do not drain.
5. Carefully pour about half of the cauliflower mixture into a blender. Blend until smooth.
6. Repeat with remaining mixture. Set aside.
7. Melt margarine in a 3-quart saucepan over low heat.
8. Stir in flour and cook, stirring constantly, until flour is absorbed.
9. Stir in milk and the second can of broth using a wire whisk.
10. Bring to a boil and continue boiling for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
11. Stir in the reserved cauliflower mixture, pepper, and nutmeg. Heat until hot.
